Rising delinquency in subprime auto book
Litigation reserve build for legacy mortgage origination
company.ai_summary: Morgan Stanley sits in the Moderate risk band. Revenue trajectory is healthy mid-single-digit, complaint volume is in line with sector medians (8/qtr normalized), and 8-K activity is unremarkable. We see no near-term catalyst that changes the constructive view.
